headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $133
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $136 to $133.
